content:
A 2 minute overview of Nymphaea. She's one of the few Awakeners that can hit through Barrier! (via her exalt <:Nymphaea_sleepy:1459080442442678374> )
https://youtube.com/shorts/NZQcIKACORw?si=fEtUvP7S6aTlfox2

embeds.title: Morimens: Nymphaea Overview #morimens #animehorrorgame #lovecraftia...
embeds.description:
"This projected body remains in the form of a girl who passed away prematurely. With tattered clothes, pale skin, and eyes filled with shadows of the past, it silently tells of a history entwined with illness and suffering."
